roles.title: Senior Analyst
bullets: Backend and infrastructure engineer across 3 projects under one client simultaneously — transaction systems, client-facing platforms, and core banking services for global banks and private wealth clients
Built system frameworks for wealth management products that required both technical delivery and understanding of how the client actually uses the system day to day
Working across multiple interface levels in the same engagement — architecture, implementation, and client-side consulting depending on what the project needs

roles.title: Analyst
bullets: Institutional client consulting for a global bank — ICM systems design and front-office automated system implementation
Moved to a Southeast Asian core banking project as a backend and infrastructure engineer, working on migration and stabilization of systems that run live transactions
Remote engagement across time zones, so client communication and technical delivery ran in parallel rather than in sequence

roles.title: Trainee Analyst
bullets: Designed a mutual fund system for one of India's leading private banks and got a Pat on the Back award for it
Built data pipeline and UI for the Syninformation platform, got recognized as Star Performer that quarter
One of 6 employees across India picked for Synpulse's internal data visualization and analytics certification

roles.title: Intern
bullets: Built the Business Radar dashboard in Angular, Spring Boot, SQL, and Python for Synpulse's Germany team
Earned BRv7 certification during the internship
Converted directly to Trainee Analyst via Pre-Placement Offer

roles.title: AI / ML Freelancer
bullets: Delivered the Trek Recommendation System, a content-based ML recommender covering 208+ treks using Flask and scikit-learn KNN
Worked on NLP and data pipeline projects for independent clients in research and product domains

roles.title: Research Intern
bullets: Sponsored by Dr. Krishnanjan Bhattacharjee (Joint Director, SPG)
Worked on domain identification for named entity disambiguation using DistilBERT and zero-shot classification across 6 domains
99.24% domain classification accuracy and 93% NER on an 11,000+ row dataset
Built the data pipeline in Selenium and deployed a Streamlit interface for the team

roles.title: Full-Stack Developer Intern
bullets: Built a MERN application for real-time cryptocurrency price tracking
Implemented the filtering API and wired up MongoDB for data management
Built and styled the React frontend
